product.title: 1 CT cussion cut vintage Gold ring
product.productDescription: Solid 14 Karat Solid-Gold 3/4 Carat Round-Cut Morganite and 0.15 Carat cttw Diamond Engagement Ring. Includes Geometric Style Near Colorless .09 Carat cttw Diamond Stackable Ring Wedding Band (H-I, I1); Band Measures 3.2 mm Long x 19.3 mm Wide x 2.2 mm High; Diameter Varies by Size.

product.title: Rose gold zarcoon over silver
product.productDescription: Rose Gold Over Silver Simulated Morganite & Cubic Zirconia Square Halo Ring. Make an instant impression when you adorn your hand with this striking, simulated morganite and cubic zirconia ring. Shape: round Setting: prong Gemstones may have been treated to enhance their appearance. Color: Pink. Gender: Female. Age Group: Adult. Material: Gold Plate.

product.title: Silver Diamond Ring
product.productDescription: Plutus Rhodium Finish Sterling Silver Cubic Zirconia Princess Solitaire. Gorgeously crafted of .925 sterling silver with a lustrous rhodium finish for an elegant look, this solitaire engagement ring is a true stunner.

product.title: Miabella 5 ct CZ Sterling Silver Halo Engagement ring
product.productDescription: Just like your love, the sparkling beauty of this Miabella Cubic Zirconia Halo Engagement Ring will last a lifetime. The engagement ring features a dazzling round-cut CZ (9mm) at its center, haloed by 24 round CZ accents.

product.title: Silver Celtic Claddagh woman ring
product.productDescription: This Claddagh ring is made from sterling silver and is hallmarked .925.It was individually handcrafted by a Silversmith in Ireland. The Claddagh symbol repeats itself on the opposite side and the two are connected by Celtic knot designs on each side of the ring.

product.title: Diamond 10K Gold Wedding Band
product.productDescription: Diamond wedding band is the perfect illustration of your eternal bond. 5 ct. t.w. of sparkling round diamonds in a channel setting create a dramatic look that's sure will be noticed.

product.title: Center Stone AquaMarine
product.productDescription: This Aquamarine ringin 18k White Gold has intricate details that will enchant you matter which angle you lookat it. Delicate petals reach upyo the stonefrom the engraved style shank. Sweet ribbons wrap around the front completing the antique style of this ring.

product.title: Diamond Ring Sterling Silver 10K yellow Gold
product.productDescription: This exciting sterling silver ring for her is embellished with diamond accents and a ribbon of 10K yellow gold winding along the design.
